Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/webinars.asp

# Websites, Technology, and Cybersecurity Webinars

## Resource summary
Use for website creation, tech adoption, cybersecurity, resilience, and digital operations.

## BOSS routing use
Route users to the webinar catalog and tell them to filter by this topic. Pair with one-on-one SBDC advising when the user needs tailored application to their business.

## User-facing next action
Open the source URL and filter the webinar list by the relevant topic and live/recorded format.
